title: casetrack-nf-subworkflows specimen-level samplesheet schema
description: Samplesheet shape for tracked subworkflows that operate on specimen-level inputs (e.g. merged BAMs). No assay_id column — one row per specimen. ADR-001 D2.

specimen.errorMessage: specimen must match ^[A-Za-z0-9_][A-Za-z0-9_-]*$; also used as meta.id

genome.errorMessage: genome must be one of mm10, mm39, hg38, GRCh37, t2t, chm13

bam.errorMessage: bam must be a BAM or CRAM file path (specimen-level merged BAM)

bai.errorMessage: bai must be a BAI/CRAI/CSI index file path
